title: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING — Garage Jack and Safety Stand

figures_detected.description: Underside view of Nissan Micra showing garage jack points and safety stand points, with inset illustrations of safety stand attachment (S.S.T. No. LM4519-0000) being fitted to lower side sill groove.

content_blocks.text: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING
Never get under the vehicle while it is supported only by the jack. Always use safety stands when you have to get under the vehicle.
Place wheel chocks at the front wheels when the rear wheels are raised and place wheel chocks at the rear wheels when the front wheels are raised.

content_blocks.description: Underside view of vehicle showing designated garage jack points and safety stand points. The safety stand attachment (S.S.T. No. LM4519-0000) is placed on the safety stand and the lower side sill is fitted into the groove of the attachment.

callouts.label: Garage jack points
callouts.position: Multiple points on underside of vehicle indicated by arrows

callouts.label: Safety stand points
callouts.position: Multiple points on underside of vehicle indicated by arrows

callouts.label: Fit the lower side sill into groove

tools_referenced.name: Safety Stand Attachment
tools_referenced.usage: Attachment placed on safety stand to fit the lower side sill into groove when supporting the vehicle
